writing.title: Writing Task 2: Describe an interrupted moment
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing an action that was interrupted, using Past Continuous + when + Past Simple.
writing.sampleAnswer: I was cooking dinner when the phone rang. I was watching TV when I heard the noise. Meanwhile, my neighbours were running outside.
checklist: Dùng when + Past Simple cho hành động gián đoạn
Có thể dùng meanwhile để mô tả việc xảy ra đồng thời

writing.title: Writing Task 2: Review — An unexpected story
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) telling a short story, combining Conditional, relative clauses, used to, Reported Speech, and Past Continuous from Chương 9.
writing.sampleAnswer: I was walking to the shop where I used to buy bread every morning. While I was walking, a man who I knew told me that the shop was closed. If that happened to me again, I would try a different shop nearby.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 4 cấu trúc đã học trong Chương 9
Câu chuyện có trình tự rõ ràng
Đủ số từ tối thiểu yêu cầu
